method.step_1: Represent each truck-day with stop-zone, GPS image, route distance, and fleet metadata.
method.step_2: Build stop-profile vectors and route-image clusters as evidence.
method.step_3: Ask the LLM to reason over statistical evidence and produce final pairwise truck correlations.
method.step_4: Normalize positive LLM-reasoned target-to-other correlations into truck appearance frequencies.
method.step_5: Sample target route clusters by target route frequency and other-truck routes by joint frequency.
method.truck_appearance_frequency: Positive target-to-other LLM-reasoned correlations normalized across other trucks.
method.route_appearance_frequency: Cluster days divided by selected period length.
method.joint_scenario_frequency: LLM truck appearance frequency multiplied by route appearance frequency.

1247.llm_rationale: Stop profiles are strongly aligned, but purpose mismatch, weak route similarity, and only moderate kilometer similarity lower the practical similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose does not; age and kilometer similarity are moderate at best.

1311.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation and purpose mismatch dominate, despite good kilometer similarity and matching duty cycle.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kilometers are similar, but purpose does not match.

1312.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile and kilometer similarity support behavioral overlap, but purpose mismatch and very low route similarity prevent a higher score.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kilometers are similar, but purpose does not match.

1350.llm_rationale: Moderate similarity supported by same purpose, same duty cycle, and decent kilometer similarity, though stop-profile and route similarity are not strong.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match; kilometer similarity is fair, age similarity is low-moderate.

1363.llm_rationale: Stop-profile similarity is moderate, but purpose mismatch, weak kilometer similarity, and very low route similarity reduce behavioral confidence.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose and kilometer similarity are weak.

1421.llm_rationale: Same purpose and duty cycle with good kilometer similarity, but the stop-profile match is only moderate-low and route similarity is very weak.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match; kilometer similarity is fairly good, age similarity is limited.

1423.llm_rationale: Negative stop-profile correlation, purpose mismatch, and low route similarity indicate weak behavioral similarity despite kilometer and duty-cycle support.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kilometers are similar, but purpose does not match.

1506.llm_rationale: No stop-profile correlation, no purpose match, no duty-cycle match, and weak kilometer similarity make this the least similar pair despite the highest route score.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Highest among listed pairs but still low in absolute terms.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle do not match; age and kilometer similarity are weak.

1575.llm_rationale: Excellent kilometer similarity and matching duty cycle help, but purpose mismatch, low route similarity, and only moderate stop-profile similarity limit correlation.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Kilometers are highly similar and duty cycle matches, but purpose does not.

1576.llm_rationale: Moderate similarity: same purpose and duty cycle with moderate stop-profile and kilometer similarity, but representative route similarity is very weak.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Very low route-image similarity limits confidence.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match; age and kilometers are only moderately similar.

1578.llm_rationale: Good stop-profile and kilometer similarity are offset by different purpose and extremely weak route-image similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kilometers are similar, but purpose and age similarity are weak.

1667.llm_rationale: No stop-profile correlation and no purpose match leave only duty-cycle and moderate kilometer similarity as support.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose does not; kilometer similarity is moderate.

1687.llm_rationale: Only modest stop-profile similarity is present, while purpose, kilometers, and route-image similarity provide limited support.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose does not; age and kilometers are weakly similar.

1688.llm_rationale: Same purpose and duty cycle are outweighed by negative stop-profile correlation and weak kilometer/age similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.stop_profile_correlation: Negative stop-profile correlation indicates dissimilar stop-zone behavior.
llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Low route similarity despite being higher than many pairs.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match, but age and kilometers are weakly similar.

1785.llm_rationale: Purpose and duty cycle match, but negative stop-profile correlation and very low route similarity suggest limited behavioral similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Purpose and duty cycle match; kilometer similarity is moderate, age similarity is weak.

1993.llm_rationale: High stop-profile similarity suggests similar zone behavior, but different purpose, weak route similarity, and low kilometer similarity reduce the overall correlation.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose does not; age and kilometers are weakly similar.

2191.llm_rationale: Moderate stop-profile similarity and good kilometer similarity exist, but purpose mismatch and low route similarity keep the pair below moderate-high similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle and kilometers align, but purpose does not and age similarity is weak.

2201.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile similarity and matching duty cycle are meaningful, but purpose mismatch, low kilometer similarity, and weak route similarity reduce the total.

llm_feature_interpretation.route_similarity: Low, though slightly higher than many other pairs.
llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose, age, and kilometers are weakly similar.

2518.llm_rationale: Strong stop-profile alignment is the main evidence, but purpose mismatch, low route similarity, and weak age/kilometer similarity argue against high behavioral similarity.

llm_feature_interpretation.fleet_metadata: Duty cycle matches, but purpose does not; age and kilometers are weakly similar.

final_scenario.sampling_method: For each scenario day, sample the target truck route from its own route_appearance_frequency, then sample one other truck route from joint_scenario_frequency = truck_appearance_frequency * route_appearance_frequency.
